BrowseSearchAbout

Annotation

the horses

R the horses

There are two possible interpretations: the horses may be drawing Phoebus' chariot, but they may also be beating up the dawn on earth, with the sun rising overhead. Hence they would represent the army approaching from Istria, converging Venice's fall to Austria with Antony's fall to Ceasar.
